string.text: Just took out this bastard. %s bit the dust in %s, one of the %s. Didn't stand a chance against me. One less rat.
Thought you could take me, %s? You were dead wrong here in %s. Another %s eating dirt thanks to my rifle.
Put a bullet in %s's head here in %s. You're history, %s. Next time think twice before aiming at me.
Just executed %s in %s. Was running with the %s, now he's running with nobody. Problem solved.
%s tried to fuck me over in %s. Was with the %s, now he's pig food.
Took down %s in %s. The %s have a hole in their ranks thanks to me. Don't look for me, you'll find me.
%s thought he could take me in %s. Mistake. Was with the %s, now he's with the dirt. Zone's justice.
Casualty report: %s neutralized in %s, of the %s. He asked for it, I just delivered.
One less %s breathing in %s. Of the %s, of course. Don't ask me to cry, he did me a favor.
%s came up short in %s. Was with the %s and now he's fertilizer for the Zone. Next.
Executed: %s in %s. Belonged to the %s. Bad decision crossing my path.
